response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience that align with the role’s technical demands, but his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and his resume lacks clear evidence of executive leadership, architectural oversight of client projects, or formal project management experience in an IT consulting context.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective, DLang tools)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js, Linux)
Demonstrated mentorship and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and web internals
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic — falls far short of required C1 level
No clear evidence of client-facing architectural advisory or IT consulting project leadership
Resume emphasizes individual coding and tools over team management or strategic project oversight
